column5: Angular red bricks and concrete fragments with some grey, silty SAND. (FILL)
Sub-rounded GRAVEL and COBBLES of moderately decomposed granite

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE with medium to closely spaced, very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained, chlorite and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 40 degrees-50 degrees & 75 degrees-85 degrees.
